description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the debian:testing-slim Docker image. Define a before_script that runs apt-get update && apt-get install -y hugo git-core, then git submodule init and git submodule update --force. Add a test job (default test stage) that runs hugo -s web/hacklabcormano/ and is excluded from the master branch. Add a pages job (deploy stage) that runs hugo -s web/hacklabcormano/, creates a public directory, copies web/hacklabcormano/public/* into public, publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and only runs on the master branch.
